name: switchyard
description: A local, project-oriented development command center

scripts.desktop:dev: cd desktop/src-tauri && pnpm -C ../.. exec tauri dev
scripts.desktop:build: cd desktop/src-tauri && pnpm -C ../.. exec tauri build --debug
scripts.desktop:release: cd desktop/src-tauri && pnpm -C ../.. exec tauri build --config tauri.release.conf.json --ci
